description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with test and build stages, a global before_script that runs `uname -a`, and variables ARTIFACT_DOWNLOAD_ATTEMPTS, GET_SOURCES_ATTEMPTS, MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD and packetver. In the test stage add a `.mariadb_run_valgrind_latest` job using the `ubuntu:18.04` image and a `mariadb:latest` service that runs `export CC=gcc-6`, `./.tools/jobs/install.sh "mysql-client gcc-6 git-core make autoconf automake autopoint libssl-dev openssl libtool libmariadbclient-dev libz-dev libpcre3-dev valgrind"`, `grep -nR CRYPTO_new_ex_data /usr/include/openssl/`, `ls /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/ | grep libcrypto`, `nm /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.a | grep CRYPTO_new`, `ldd /usr/bin/openssl`, `./.tools/jobs/cloneall.sh`, `./.tools/jobs/initdb.sh mariadb`, `./.tools/jobs/build.sh "--enable-packetver=${packetver} --enable-epoll --enable-debug --disable-manager --enable-Werror --enable-buildbot" "--enable-werror"`, and `./.tools/jobs/runservervalgrind.sh mariadb`. Also in test add a `licensecheck` job on `ubuntu:22.04` tagged lightweight that runs `./.tools/jobs/licensecheck.sh`. Add `newlines` and `spaces` jobs on `debian:bookworm` tagged lightweight; `newlines` runs `./.tools/jobs/install.sh "dos2unix git-core"` then `./.tools/jobs/newlines.sh`, while `spaces` (allow_failure) runs `./.tools/jobs/install.sh "sed git-core"`, `cd npc`, and `../.tools/jobs/spaces.sh`; both upload untracked artifacts always retained for three weeks. In the build stage add a `mysql_run_8.0` job using `ubuntu:22.04` with a `mysql:8.0` service that runs `export CC=gcc-9`, `./.tools/jobs/install.sh "mysql-client=8.0.28-0ubuntu4 libmysqlclient21=8.0.28-0ubuntu4 gcc-9 git-core make autoconf automake autopoint libssl-dev libtool libmysqlclient-dev=8.0.28-0ubuntu4 libz-dev libpcre3-dev"`, `./.tools/jobs/cloneall.sh`, `./.tools/jobs/initdb.sh mysql`, `./.tools/jobs/build.sh "--enable-packetver=${packetver} --enable-epoll --enable-debug --enable-sanitize=full --disable-manager --enable-Werror --enable-buildbot" "--enable-werror --enable-lto --enable-sanitize"`, and `./.tools/jobs/runserver.sh mysql`; and a `mysql_run_latest` job (allow_failure) similar but with `export CC=gcc-12`, a generic install script, and the same build and run steps.
